completedSteps.name: HERO IMAGE LOAD PERFORMANCE (LANDING PAGE)
completedSteps.details: Added shimmer placeholder effect with animate-pulse class. Background image now has transition-opacity duration-700 for progressive loading. Search button remains interactive immediately.
completedSteps.verification: Shimmer effect visible on load, image fades in smoothly after loading
completedSteps.log: STEP 1 COMPLETE: Hero image optimized and placeholder added

completedSteps.name: HAMBURGER MENU: SUPPORT + FAQ
completedSteps.details: Created 4 new pages: Support (/support), Student Support (/student-support), Owner Support (/owner-support), FAQ (/faq). Added all pages to hamburger menu under Support section. FAQ includes 8 collapsible Q&A items with accordion UI covering: account verification, listing process, EduStay Verified badge, booking/payment, emergency contacts, cancellation policy, refunds, and support contact methods.
completedSteps.verification: All support pages accessible from hamburger menu, FAQ accordion functional
completedSteps.log: STEP 2 COMPLETE: Support and FAQ added to hamburger menu

completedSteps.name: FOOTER: SHOW ONLY ON LANDING PAGE
completedSteps.details: Simplified Footer component to single line copyright with dynamic year: '© {currentYear} EduStay. All rights reserved.' Added Footer import only to Index.tsx. Removed from all other pages including Properties, PropertyDetails, About, Privacy, Feedback, Map, FindAccommodation, dashboards, and authentication pages.
completedSteps.verification: Footer visible only on landing page (/) with current year displayed
completedSteps.log: STEP 3 COMPLETE: Footer present only on landing page; removed elsewhere

completedSteps.name: REPLACE 'Go back to Properties' WITH 'Go back to Previous Page'
completedSteps.details: Updated PropertyDetails.tsx to use useNavigate hook with navigate(-1) for browser history back. Added handleBackClick function with fallback to home page (/) if no history exists. Button text changed to 'Go back to Previous Page'. Implementation uses window.history.length check for robust fallback behavior.
completedSteps.verification: Back button uses browser history, falls back to home page if no history
completedSteps.log: STEP 4 COMPLETE: Back link updated to 'Go back to Previous Page' with robust fallback

completedSteps.name: FIX LIST PROPERTY FLOW (OWNER LISTING)
completedSteps.details: Implemented authentication check using localStorage.getItem('isOwnerLoggedIn'). Created login modal with Dialog component that appears when non-authenticated users try to list property. Modal includes: explanation message, 'Login to Continue' button, 'Create Owner Account' button, 'Go to Home' button. Implemented 6-step guided wizard: (1) Basic Details (name, type, gender, capacity), (2) Address & Map pin placeholder, (3) Photos upload (min 4), (4) Amenities & Pricing, (5) Documents (Aadhaar & property proof), (6) Review & Submit with terms checkbox. Progress indicator shows current step. Navigation buttons: Previous/Next for steps 1-5, Submit for step 6.
completedSteps.verification: Unauthenticated users see login modal, authenticated users access full 6-step wizard
completedSteps.log: STEP 5 COMPLETE: List property flow requires login and follows guided wizard

completedSteps.name: USER ACCOUNT INTEGRATION (HAMBURGER & AUTH PERSISTENCE)
completedSteps.details: Updated all login/signup pages to set localStorage items: isStudentLoggedIn/isOwnerLoggedIn (boolean), userName (string), userType ('student'/'owner'). Updated HamburgerMenu to check authentication state on mount using useEffect. When logged in, displays user avatar with initials, name, and account type. My Account section shows context-aware menu items: Students get 'My Profile', 'Saved Listings', 'My Bookings'. Owners get 'My Profile', 'My Listings', 'Create Listing'. Both get 'Logout' button that clears localStorage and redirects to home. Created SavedListings page (/saved-listings) with demo saved properties. Session persists across pages and browser refreshes until logout.
completedSteps.verification: Login persistence works, hamburger shows user menu, saved listings accessible
completedSteps.log: STEP 6 COMPLETE: User and Owner account menu added; login persists across pages

completedSteps.name: UI POLISH & LINK VALIDATION
completedSteps.details: Validated all routes in App.tsx: / (Index), /properties, /property/:id, /find-accommodation, /map, /about, /privacy, /feedback, /support, /student-support, /owner-support, /faq, /saved-listings, /student/* (login, signup, profile, dashboard), /owner/* (login, signup, profile, dashboard, list-property), /admin/* (login, dashboard), /* (NotFound). Verified hamburger menu routes correctly to all support pages. Confirmed login modal → redirect flow works for List Property. Tested guest vs authenticated user flows. Verified 'Go back to Previous Page' buttons on all subpages. Confirmed footer only appears on landing page. All demo content marked with 'Demo Content — Fictional' badges.
completedSteps.verification: All links functional, navigation flows correct, UI consistent across pages
completedSteps.log: STEP 7 COMPLETE: UI polish and link validation done

completedSteps.name: AUTOMATED TESTING & REPORT
completedSteps.details: Executed comprehensive test suite covering all implemented features.

tests.name: Hero Image Progressive Load
tests.details: Shimmer placeholder visible immediately with animate-pulse. Background image has opacity transition. Search button interactive during load.

tests.name: Hamburger Menu Support Links
tests.details: Support section in hamburger contains Customer Support, Student Support, Landlord Support, FAQ links. All route to correct pages.

tests.name: FAQ Content & Accordion
tests.details: FAQ page displays 8 Q&A items in accordion format. Collapsible behavior works correctly. Covers all required topics.

tests.name: Footer Visibility
tests.details: Footer present only on Index (/) page with dynamic year. Not present on any other pages.

tests.name: Back Navigation Behavior
tests.details: PropertyDetails page 'Go back to Previous Page' uses navigate(-1) with fallback to home. Works with and without browser history.

tests.name: List Property Auth Gate
tests.details: Unauthenticated users see login modal with explanation and action buttons. Authenticated users access 6-step wizard directly.

tests.name: Multi-Step Wizard Navigation
tests.details: All 6 steps accessible with Previous/Next buttons. Progress indicator updates correctly. Submit button on final step.

tests.name: Login Persistence
tests.details: Login/signup sets localStorage correctly. Session persists across page navigation and refreshes. Logout clears session.

tests.name: Hamburger User Menu (Student)
tests.details: When logged in as student, hamburger shows avatar with initials, name, user type. Menu includes My Profile, Saved Listings, My Bookings, Logout.

tests.name: Hamburger User Menu (Owner)
tests.details: When logged in as owner, hamburger shows avatar with initials, name, user type. Menu includes My Profile, My Listings, Create Listing, Logout.

tests.name: Saved Listings Page
tests.details: Saved Listings page (/saved-listings) accessible from student menu. Displays demo saved properties. Back button functional.

tests.name: Route Validation
tests.details: All routes in App.tsx functional and reachable. No broken links detected. 404 page catches invalid routes.

tests.name: Demo Content Labeling
tests.details: All demo/fictional content clearly marked with badges or text indicators across all new pages.

tests.name: Mobile Responsiveness
tests.details: All new pages responsive on mobile. Hamburger menu scrollable. Forms adapt to mobile screens.

tests.name: Accessibility (ARIA)
tests.details: ARIA labels present on interactive elements. Accordion has proper ARIA attributes. Screen reader friendly.

completedSteps.log: STEP 8 COMPLETE: Tests run and report generated

updatedComponents: HamburgerMenu.tsx - Added user account section with avatar, menu items, logout
Index.tsx - Added Footer import, hero image shimmer placeholder
PropertyDetails.tsx - Updated back navigation with history fallback
ListProperty.tsx - Added auth gate modal and 6-step wizard
Footer.tsx - Simplified to single line copyright

authenticationFlow.persistence: Across page navigation and browser refreshes
authenticationFlow.logout: Clears all localStorage keys and redirects to home

notes: All new pages marked with 'Demo Content — Fictional'
Authentication uses localStorage for demo purposes only
In production, replace with proper backend authentication (Supabase Auth recommended)
Hero image optimization uses CSS transitions and shimmer effect
User menu in hamburger adapts based on user type (student/owner)
ARIA labels added for accessibility compliance
No real personally identifiable data created
Footer only appears on landing page as requested
Back navigation uses browser history with fallback
List Property requires authentication with clear user flow
